mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (CASE job WHEN 1 THEN '班主任' WHEN 2 THEN '讲师' WHEN 3 THEN '学工主管' WHEN 4 THEN '教研主管' WHEN 5 THEN '咨询师' ELSE '其他' END) AS pos, COUNT(*) AS num from emp GROUP BY job ORDER BY num;
SELECT IF(gender = 1, '男性员工', '女性员工') AS name, count(*) AS value FROM emp GROUP BY gender;
SELECT id, username, password, name, entry_date, gender, image, job, salary, dept_id, create_time, update_time FROM emp
